heading: Exhibiting merchant mariners’ documents
label: 10503 Exhibiting merchant mariners’ documents
text: Before signing the agreement required by , a seaman required by to have a merchant mariner’s document shall exhibit to the master a document issued to the seaman and appropriately endorsed for the capacity in which the seaman is to serve.section 10502 of this titlesection 8701 of this title
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource section (U.S. Code)1050346:643Under section 10503 seamen who are required to have a merchant mariner’s document must exhibit it before signing a shipping agreement on a coastwise voyage.
